question.text: Advance tax under presumptive taxation for derivatives can be paid:

answer.text: 100% in a single installment by 15th March of the relevant financial year
At the time of filing return

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under presumptive taxation, the entire advance tax can be paid in one installment by March 15. This simplifies the advance tax compliance for small traders. **The Trap:** Normal taxpayers must pay advance tax in quarterly installments. Presumptive scheme allows single payment. **Cross-Exam Context:** Advance tax rules are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Missing the March 15 deadline attracts interest under Section 234C, even under presumptive taxation.
